title: Tick Control New Brunswick, NJ | $125-$325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in New Brunswick, NJ. Protect your family from Lyme disease with expert tick treatments. Affordable pricing $125-$325. Call today!
intro: New Brunswick residents face increasing tick populations due to the city's proximity to parks, wooded areas, and the Raritan River greenways. Our professional tick control services protect your family and pets from tick-borne diseases with targeted treatments designed for New Brunswick's unique landscape. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick elimination and prevention for homes and businesses throughout Middlesex County.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving New Brunswick with EPA-approved tick treatments that are safe for children and pets. Our locally-based technicians understand the specific tick species prevalent in the Raritan Valley area and deliver same-day service with guaranteed results.
localContext: New Brunswick's college town atmosphere, with Rutgers University campus and surrounding residential neighborhoods, creates numerous tick habitats in yards, parks, and recreational areas near the Delaware and Raritan Canal. From the historic downtown district to suburban properties near Boyd Park and Buccleuch Park, our treatments are customized for New Brunswick's diverse property types and proximity to natural tick breeding grounds.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: New Brunswick's location along the Raritan River and proximity to wooded parks creates ideal tick habitats. Ticks in this area carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional tick control essential for protecting your family, pets, and students in this college community.

faqs.question: What does your tick control service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive tick control includes a thorough property inspection, targeted treatment of high-risk areas like tall grass, shrubs, and wooded borders, perimeter barrier application, and follow-up monitoring. We use EPA-approved products that eliminate ticks at all life stages while remaining safe for your family and pets.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in New Brunswick?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in New Brunswick range from $125 to $325 depending on property size, infestation severity, and treatment frequency. We offer seasonal packages and one-time treatments, with free estimates provided after a property assessment to give you accurate pricing for your specific situation.

faqs.question: When is tick season in New Brunswick, NJ?
faqs.answer: Tick season in New Brunswick typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. However, deer ticks can be active whenever temperatures exceed 35°F. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining protection through fall for optimal results.
